title: nolletia ruderalis
intro: Nolletia ruderalis, also known as the bitter weed or wild bittersweet, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and diarrhea. The health benefits of Nolletia ruderalis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms associated with gastrointestinal disorders.
